Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Song Qian is not killed by Li Dian at Hefei, and historically, fights at Yiling, a much later campaign.

full_text:
Song Qian 宋謙
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Song Qian (宋謙). Served Wu. In the novel, is killed by Li Dian at Hefei, but historically fights at Yiling. Song Qian was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
